cast.name: Valérie Lillibeth
cast.character: Muse of the Lemon Prize Winner

plot outline: Everything is connected: an 1849 diary of an ocean voyage across the Pacific, letters from a composer to his lover, a thriller about a conspiracy at a nuclear power plant, a farce about a publisher in a nursing home;, a rebellious clone in futuristic Korea, and the tale of a tribe living on post-apocalyptic Hawaii far in the future.
title: Cloud Atlas
